steps.title: Combine the $x$ terms
steps.content:
The $x$-coefficient is $4p-15p-75$, so the expression becomes:
$$8x^2+(-11p-75)x+28$$

steps.title: Match the target coefficient
steps.content:
The equivalent expression is $8x^2-152x+28$, so the $x$-coefficients must be equal:
$$-11p-75=-152$$
$$-11p=-77$$
$$p=7$$

steps.title: Choose the answer
steps.content: $p=7$ matches B. A quick coefficient check gives $-11(7)-75=-152$, exactly the target $x$-coefficient.
